{{Infobox character
| name = Talos
| aliases = Heir Talos
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Damascan royal Heir, Heir Talos, unit leader, lord
| abilities = Traveler of Ragnarus
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

''See also: [[Talos Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Talos, also referred to as Heir Talos, is the firstborn son of [[Zakareth the Sixth]] and the remaining legitimate successor to the [[Damascan]] throne. Physically, he is a tall, powerful individual with blond hair and striking facial features, often projecting an air of arrogant self-assurance. While he carries the title of Heir rather than prince, his presence is commanding and sometimes appears fueled by a sense of madness or intense hunger. Talos is a dangerous political figure who has formed secret alliances with [[Overlords]], including [[Lysander]], to further his own ambitions. His primary objectives involve the assassination of the [[King]] during wartime and seizing power for himself, showing little concern for the welfare of the [[Damascan]] people or the stability of the nation. Throughout his interactions, he is known to offer alliances or threats of combat, and he has been observed experiencing significant physical pain following an injury to his eye.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Talos, the curly golden-haired firstborn son of [[King Zakareth the Sixth]] and heir to the [[Damascan]] throne, acted as a proud older brother to [[Leah]]. Clad in a black and red suit and wielding a crimson blade artifact of Ragnarus, he spent years planning with [[Lysander]] to assassinate the [[King]]. As a lord and unit leader, Talos utilized his abilities as a [[Traveler of Ragnarus]] to bring a strike force from [[Enosh]] to betray [[Zakareth]]. During the ensuing battle, he commanded his forces and engaged his father using a jeweled staff to deflect a spear. Ultimately, Talos was located in the [[Damascan camp]] on the verge of death, his body lying upon blue tiles with a livid red mark around his neck.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is [[Leah]]'s brother.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is a [[Damascan]] royal Heir.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] carries a [[sword]] with a red blade which is an artifact of Ragnarus.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] intends to remove [[Indirial]] before making a move.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is a character who acted like a proud big brother to [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] plans to assassinate the [[King]] during war preparations.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is the son of [[King]] [[Zakareth]] and is referred to as Heir [[Talos]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] has curly golden hair.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] wears a black and red suit.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] claims to be the firstborn son of [[Zakareth the Sixth]] and Heir to the [[Damascan]] throne.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] and [[Lysander]] have been planning against [[King]] [[Zakareth]] for years.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is someone whose activities are unknown during the [[King]]'s absence.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is a [[Traveler of Ragnarus]] and can only Travel back to [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is the royal Heir.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] may have to work with [[Talos]] for the attack on [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is a unit leader.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is a lord.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] wields a crimson blade.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] stepped out from a tent behind [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The battle erupted under [[Talos]]' command.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Leah]] intends to look for [[Talos]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Heir [[Talos]] has a rendezvous point.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Heir [[Talos]] was located in the [[Damascan camp]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] was waiting for the [[Grandmasters]] and appeared to be on the verge of death.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Heir [[Talos]] fights with a jeweled staff to deflect his father's spear.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] raised his staff to focus behind the [[King]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is a [[Ragnarus Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] betrayed [[Zakareth]] by bringing a strike force from [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]]'s body lay on blue tiles with a livid red mark around his neck.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Eliadel, this man claims to be Talos, firstborn son of Zakareth the Sixth, and Heir to the Damascan throne."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
